      Id: DBVO003,
      Severity: Error,
      Message: The property 'Name' has [CustomEquality] but is missing the required static method 'Equals_Name' with signature: private static void Equals_Name(in T value, in T otherValue, out bool result),
      Location: (9,19)
    },
    {
      Id: DBVO004,
      Severity: Error,
      Message: The property 'Name' has [CustomEquality] but is missing the required static method 'GetHashCode_Name',
      Location: (9,19)
    }
  ],
  GeneratedSources: [
    {
      HintName: Person.g.cs,
      Content:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;

namespace TestNamespace
{
    partial class Person
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Determines whether this Person is equal to another based on their values.
        /// </summary>
        protected override bool EqualsCore(Person other)
        {
            bool result;

            Equals_Name(Name, other.Name, out result);
            if (!result) return false;
            return true;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Returns a hash code for this value object's values.
        /// </summary>
        protected override int GetHashCodeCore()
        {
            var hashCode = new HashCode();

            GetHashCode_Name(Name, ref hashCode);

            return hashCode.ToHashCode();
        }

    }
}

    }
  ]
}
